data.name: Heavy Hearts
data.detailed_description:
An extinction event took place.

Luccia is one of the few survivors of an invasion by an ancient race called the "Glithe". 
She nearly died, but managed to escape by mere chance.
 
Only a few humans remain living in isolation and those that are found are used for labor, pleasure, or worse...

You play as Luccia, a warrior torn from her home, with only her friend Rhed they must stop the extinction, even if that means Luccia must repopulate the human race...

As an action RPG, Heavy Hearts will challenge you against various foes, bosses, and super bosses. Each one is uniquely crafted and suited to force Luccia to use various skills in her arsenal. 

  • Strike your opponent's with Luccia's trusty blade, the Claymost.

  • Charge your Aether and disintegrate foe's with magic

  • Infuse Elements into your attacks to exploit enemy weaknesses

  • Use precision heavy strikes at the right moment to finish monsters off

  • Beware of lewd traps that could slow Luccia down!

  • With 16 explorable realms over two continents, there will be much to traverse as the quest continues

  • Collect rare items in combat, or throughout the realm. Use them to advance other quests or to trade for upgrades.

  • Find exciting denizens along the way that have unclear motives, but just might help you under the right conditions.

  • Trust nobody - Humans are rare finds these days. Don't give anyone a chance to turn you in.

  • Sneak around the villages or use a disguise - This way, Luccia is safe from being discovered.

  •  Meet fantastical, diverse mythological races across the land of Arteria

  •  Make lasting relationships with your team mates, and maybe some enemies too.

  •  Conversate with your teammates, and build friendships into something more...

data.short_description: If humans are near extinction - and have become a rarity. In many cases, denizens would love to get their hands on one. Luccia's quest is to stop the decline of human civilization in this action RPG, where love and lust get in the way of the mission.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 7700HQ CPU @ 2.8GHz
  • 顯示卡: NVidia GeForce GTX 1060
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8192 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 7700HQ CPU @ 2.8GHz
  • 顯示卡: NVidia GeForce GTX 16 Series
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 16384 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i7 7700HQ CPU @ 2.8GHz
  • Graphics: NVidia GeForce GTX 1060
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 8192 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Yes

Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel Core i7 7700HQ CPU @ 2.8GHz
  • Graphics: NVidia GeForce GTX 16 Series
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 16384 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Yes
